Alerts () Messages () Log in Register

Etheria
a middle fantasy roleplay
Welcome
News
Guest
alerts msgs log in register
You are either descended from a First Monarch or are one of the undeity's champions. Either way, you can manipulate ether and produce magic. But magic seems so minute when the Seven Jeweled Courts are at odds.

Etheria is a middle fantasy animanga role play with focuses on magic, political intrigue, religious clashes, and interpersonal relationships.

Guidebook Face Claims Factions Magic Map Site Codes Shop Discord
May 29/ The first activity check is now live until June 1. Please check in through the UCP, check discord for more info.

May 16 / The Onyxian Masquerade event is now live.

April 26 / The site is now open for reading and registration. No reservations or profile submissions will be accepted until tomorrow at 5pm EST.
Event 1: Onyxian Masquerade
 ETHERIA

Guidebook
Welcome to Etheria. Read through the guidebook for everything you need to know to get started and ask in the Discord if you have any questions.
Setting History Magic Timeline Profile Guide
Jade Reunion
By Cristobal Aschento on Today at 09:27 pm
Jade
Only natives can navigate through the thick mist that blankets the Court of Jade. The strict militaristic regime keeps the populace in line, but some rebel against the system, hiding in secret places where they plot rebellions or escape into the fog. Visitors must be careful when they speak or act because any infraction could result in imprisonment or even death. Gensu, capitalBitterholdNew Gensu
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Jade
Only natives can navigate through the thick mist that blankets the Court of Jade. The strict militaristic regime keeps the populace in line, but some rebel against the system, hiding in secret places where they plot rebellions or escape into the fog. Visitors must be careful when they speak or act because any infraction could result in imprisonment or even death. Gensu, capitalBitterholdNew Gensu
Reunion

35 threads 217 posts

Jade
Reunion
By Cristobal Aschento Today at 09:27 pm
35 threads 217 posts
The Land of
Jade
Only natives can navigate through the thick mist that blankets the Court of Jade. The strict militaristic regime keeps the populace in line, but some rebel against the system, hiding in secret places where they plot rebellions or escape into the fog. Visitors must be careful when they speak or act because any infraction could result in imprisonment or even death.
  • Gensu, capital
  • Bitterhold
  • New Gensu
Reunion
By Cristobal Aschento Today at 09:27 pm
35 threads 217 posts
Jade
Onyx Tolerance
By Avis Reyes on Today at 03:10 pm
Onyx
At first sight, Onyx is a post-apocalyptic wasteland. But key passages scattered throughout the land allow entrance down into Onyx, an entirely underground court. Deep and vast caverns are their home, with several cities nestled among the stalactites. The stealthy people of Onyx don’t mind the dark, though the underground world is lit by glowing etherite and torches. Ebonmire, capitalStarlit GrottoOblivium’s Ripple
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Onyx
At first sight, Onyx is a post-apocalyptic wasteland. But key passages scattered throughout the land allow entrance down into Onyx, an entirely underground court. Deep and vast caverns are their home, with several cities nestled among the stalactites. The stealthy people of Onyx don’t mind the dark, though the underground world is lit by glowing etherite and torches. Ebonmire, capitalStarlit GrottoOblivium’s Ripple

The Land of
Onyx
At first sight, Onyx is a post-apocalyptic wasteland. But key passages scattered throughout the land allow entrance down into Onyx, an entirely underground court. Deep and vast caverns are their home, with several cities nestled among the stalactites. The stealthy people of Onyx don’t mind the dark, though the underground world is lit by glowing etherite and torches.
  • Ebonmire, capital
  • Starlit Grotto
  • Oblivium’s Ripple

Tolerance
By Avis Reyes Today at 03:10 pm
52 threads 327 posts
Onyx
Pearl [past] Every Battle Ends In...
By Amaia Mitrea on Today at 09:53 pm
Pearl
Originally an island, Pearl has maintained its beautiful, white-sand beaches and towering rainforests all these centuries. Small jungle towns are within the trees, but much of the activity occurs on the sand, where witches (matriarchal-led men and women) live in seaside caves and beach bungalows. Plenty of hunting and excursions arise deep within the jungle area, where animal life varies. Perinoit, capitalLethe’s StrandBlack Lagoon
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Pearl
Originally an island, Pearl has maintained its beautiful, white-sand beaches and towering rainforests all these centuries. Small jungle towns are within the trees, but much of the activity occurs on the sand, where witches (matriarchal-led men and women) live in seaside caves and beach bungalows. Originally an island, Pearl has maintained its beautiful, white-sand beaches and towering rainforests all these centuries. Small jungle towns are within the trees, but much of the activity occurs on the sand, where witches (matriarchal-led men and women) live in seaside caves and beach bungalows. Ruby Anacoluthon
By Cressida De Cardenas on Today at 09:34 pm
Ruby
Bards sing cautionary tales of the Harrowed that haunt the peaks of Ruby. Various rare plants grow among these mountains, including wild roses whose petals only bloom under the moonlight. The winds constantly howl through the craggy passes and jagged ridges, whistling through the ruins of old fortresses. It's said that if you listen closely enough, you will hear the whispers of dead warlords. Avinica, capitalScarlet CitadelValea Regilor
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Ruby
Bards sing cautionary tales of the Harrowed that haunt the peaks of Ruby. Various rare plants grow among these mountains, including wild roses whose petals only bloom under the moonlight. The winds constantly howl through the craggy passes and jagged ridges, whistling through the ruins of old fortresses. It's said that if you listen closely enough, you will hear the whispers of dead warlords. Avinica, capitalScarlet CitadelValea Regilor

The Land of
Ruby
Bards sing cautionary tales of the Harrowed that haunt the peaks of Ruby. Various rare plants grow among these mountains, including wild roses whose petals only bloom under the moonlight. The winds constantly howl through the craggy passes and jagged ridges, whistling through the ruins of old fortresses. It's said that if you listen closely enough, you will hear the whispers of dead warlords.
  • Avinica, capital
  • Scarlet Citadel
  • Valea Regilor

Anacoluthon
By Cressida De Cardenas Today at 09:34 pm
82 threads 534 posts
Ruby
Sapphire It's Oh So Quiet
By Valentine on 13 minutes ago
Sapphire
Glittering blue fjords cut through much of Sapphire, where winding, smaller rivers feed into. Almost all cities are directly on rivers, leaving the primary mode of transportation as gondolas. Sapphire is the unofficial capital of Adornism, a polytheistic religion bringing together the original divines. It also offers much in the way of visual arts: soaring architecture, stained glass cathedrals, marble carvings, and museums. Alenia, capitalLake MyrridenTirinSpectral Woods
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Sapphire
Glittering blue fjords cut through much of Sapphire, where winding, smaller rivers feed into. Almost all cities are directly on rivers, leaving the primary mode of transportation as gondolas. Sapphire is the unofficial capital of Adornism, a polytheistic religion bringing together the original divines. It also offers much in the way of visual arts: soaring architecture, stained glass cathedrals, marble carvings, and museums. Alenia, capitalLake MyrridenTirinSpectral Woods
It's Oh So Quiet
By Valentine 13 minutes ago
29 threads 205 posts
Ending June 5th
Sapphire
It's Oh So Quiet
By Valentine 13 minutes ago
29 threads 205 posts
The Land of
Sapphire
Glittering blue fjords cut through much of Sapphire, where winding, smaller rivers feed into. Almost all cities are directly on rivers, leaving the primary mode of transportation as gondolas. Sapphire is the unofficial capital of Adornism, a polytheistic religion bringing together the original divines. It also offers much in the way of visual arts: soaring architecture, stained glass cathedrals, marble carvings, and museums.
  • Alenia, capital
  • Lake Myrriden
  • Tirin
  • Spectral Woods
It's Oh So Quiet

29 threads 205 posts
Sapphire
Corlucet [past] Let's Get Help
By Cyrus Solace on 4 minutes ago
Corlucet
The autonomous, self-governing city-state of Corlucet is located in the heart of the Seven Jeweled Courts. Apart from the academy in which students practice magic, there are other guilds and merchant quarters nearby. Each quarter is a dynamic hub where merchants, crafters, and magicians alike bring diverse customs and cultures to life. Older students, often nobles from one of the seven courts, live off-campus among the common folk while they study. Corlucet Academy for MagicCorlucet Bazaar & TradingDead Plains
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Corlucet
The autonomous, self-governing city-state of Corlucet is located in the heart of the Seven Jeweled Courts. Apart from the academy in which students practice magic, there are other guilds and merchant quarters nearby. Each quarter is a dynamic hub where merchants, crafters, and magicians alike bring diverse customs and cultures to life. Older students, often nobles from one of the seven courts, live off-campus among the common folk while they study. Corlucet Academy for MagicCorlucet Bazaar & TradingDead Plains

The Land of
Corlucet
The autonomous, self-governing city-state of Corlucet is located in the heart of the Seven Jeweled Courts. Apart from the academy in which students practice magic, there are other guilds and merchant quarters nearby. Each quarter is a dynamic hub where merchants, crafters, and magicians alike bring diverse customs and cultures to life. Older students, often nobles from one of the seven courts, live off-campus among the common folk while they study.
  • Corlucet Academy for Magic
  • Corlucet Bazaar & Trading
  • Dead Plains

Amethyst Sinking Feeling
By Liliana Ess on 13 minutes ago
Amethyst
Fissures caused by Concordia have created a canyon landscape full of forests. Pulleys are located at outposts, allowing controlled access to and from the lush green treescapes. Amethyst is the only court that appears truly magical, full of beasts, monsters, and enchanted areas. There is so much ether in the environment here that some Amethystians are Gilded and have too much ether in their blood, causing them to have peculiar physical mutations. Rimouth, capitalThe Forest of ForgettingPercy’s Treehouse
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Amethyst

Amethyst is the only court that appears truly magical, full of beasts, monsters, and enchanted areas. There is so much ether in the environment here that some Amethystians are Gilded and have too much ether in their blood, causing them to have peculiar physical mutations. Rimouth, capitalThe Forest of ForgettingPercy’s Treehouse

Fissures caused by Concordia have created a canyon landscape full of forests. Pulleys are located at outposts, allowing controlled access to and from the lush green treescapes. Diamond My Favorite Ghost
By Alasdair Sinclair on 28 minutes ago
Diamond
Frozen over upon the capture of Nefarox two centuries ago, Diamond is a winter wonderland: beautiful in the cities and barren in rural areas. The winterscape is quite beautiful and less biting in the inhabited areas. Large ice castles that are oddly not cold to the touch serve as workshops for engineers and designers of new-age technology. This is the center hold for Etherseed, a newer religion that combats Adornism. Cuross, capitalBlackcomb SanctumWhitehaven
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Diamond
Frozen over upon the capture of Nefarox two centuries ago, Diamond is a winter wonderland: beautiful in the cities and barren in rural areas. The winterscape is quite beautiful and less biting in the inhabited areas. Large ice castles that are oddly not cold to the touch serve as workshops for engineers and designers of new-age technology. This is the center hold for Etherseed, a newer religion that combats Adornism. Cuross, capitalBlackcomb SanctumWhitehaven

Jade Reunion
By Cristobal Aschento on Today at 09:27 pm
Jade
Only natives can navigate through the thick mist that blankets the Court of Jade. The strict militaristic regime keeps the populace in line, but some rebel against the system, hiding in secret places where they plot rebellions or escape into the fog. Visitors must be careful when they speak or act because any infraction could result in imprisonment or even death. Gensu, capitalBitterholdNew Gensu
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Jade
Only natives can navigate through the thick mist that blankets the Court of Jade. The strict militaristic regime keeps the populace in line, but some rebel against the system, hiding in secret places where they plot rebellions or escape into the fog. Visitors must be careful when they speak or act because any infraction could result in imprisonment or even death. Gensu, capitalBitterholdNew Gensu

Onyx Tolerance
By Avis Reyes on Today at 03:10 pm
Onyx
At first sight, Onyx is a post-apocalyptic wasteland. But key passages scattered throughout the land allow entrance down into Onyx, an entirely underground court. Deep and vast caverns are their home, with several cities nestled among the stalactites. The stealthy people of Onyx don’t mind the dark, though the underground world is lit by glowing etherite and torches. Ebonmire, capitalStarlit GrottoOblivium’s Ripple
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Onyx
At first sight, Onyx is a post-apocalyptic wasteland. But key passages scattered throughout the land allow entrance down into Onyx, an entirely underground court. Deep and vast caverns are their home, with several cities nestled among the stalactites. The stealthy people of Onyx don’t mind the dark, though the underground world is lit by glowing etherite and torches. Ebonmire, capitalStarlit GrottoOblivium’s Ripple

Pearl [past] Every Battle Ends In...
By Amaia Mitrea on Today at 09:53 pm
Pearl
Originally an island, Pearl has maintained its beautiful, white-sand beaches and towering rainforests all these centuries. Small jungle towns are within the trees, but much of the activity occurs on the sand, where witches (matriarchal-led men and women) live in seaside caves and beach bungalows. Plenty of hunting and excursions arise deep within the jungle area, where animal life varies. Perinoit, capitalLethe’s StrandBlack Lagoon
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Pearl

Small jungle towns are within the trees, but much of the activity occurs on the sand, where witches (matriarchal-led men and women) live in seaside caves and beach bungalows. Plenty of hunting and excursions arise deep within the jungle area, where animal life varies. Perinoit, capitalLethe’s StrandBlack Lagoon

Ruby Anacoluthon
By Cressida De Cardenas on Today at 09:34 pm
Ruby
Bards sing cautionary tales of the Harrowed that haunt the peaks of Ruby. Various rare plants grow among these mountains, including wild roses whose petals only bloom under the moonlight. The winds constantly howl through the craggy passes and jagged ridges, whistling through the ruins of old fortresses. It's said that if you listen closely enough, you will hear the whispers of dead warlords. Avinica, capitalScarlet CitadelValea Regilor
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Ruby
Bards sing cautionary tales of the Harrowed that haunt the peaks of Ruby. Various rare plants grow among these mountains, including wild roses whose petals only bloom under the moonlight. The winds constantly howl through the craggy passes and jagged ridges, whistling through the ruins of old fortresses. It's said that if you listen closely enough, you will hear the whispers of dead warlords. Avinica, capitalScarlet CitadelValea Regilor

It's Oh So Quiet
By Valentine 13 minutes ago
29 threads 205 posts
The Land of
Sapphire
Glittering blue fjords cut through much of Sapphire, where winding, smaller rivers feed into. Almost all cities are directly on rivers, leaving the primary mode of transportation as gondolas. Sapphire is the unofficial capital of Adornism, a polytheistic religion bringing together the original divines. It also offers much in the way of visual arts: soaring architecture, stained glass cathedrals, marble carvings, and museums.
  • Alenia, capital
  • Lake Myrriden
  • Tirin
  • Spectral Woods
It's Oh So Quiet
By Valentine 13 minutes ago
29 threads 205 posts
Sapphire
Corlucet [past] Let's Get Help
By Cyrus Solace on 4 minutes ago
Corlucet
The autonomous, self-governing city-state of Corlucet is located in the heart of the Seven Jeweled Courts. Apart from the academy in which students practice magic, there are other guilds and merchant quarters nearby. Each quarter is a dynamic hub where merchants, crafters, and magicians alike bring diverse customs and cultures to life. Older students, often nobles from one of the seven courts, live off-campus among the common folk while they study. Corlucet Academy for MagicCorlucet Bazaar & TradingDead Plains
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Corlucet
The autonomous, self-governing city-state of Corlucet is located in the heart of the Seven Jeweled Courts. Apart from the academy in which students practice magic, there are other guilds and merchant quarters nearby. Each quarter is a dynamic hub where merchants, crafters, and magicians alike bring diverse customs and cultures to life. Older students, often nobles from one of the seven courts, live off-campus among the common folk while they study. Corlucet Academy for MagicCorlucet Bazaar & TradingDead Plains

The Land of
Corlucet
The autonomous, self-governing city-state of Corlucet is located in the heart of the Seven Jeweled Courts. Apart from the academy in which students practice magic, there are other guilds and merchant quarters nearby. Each quarter is a dynamic hub where merchants, crafters, and magicians alike bring diverse customs and cultures to life. Older students, often nobles from one of the seven courts, live off-campus among the common folk while they study.
  • Corlucet Academy for Magic
  • Corlucet Bazaar & Trading
  • Dead Plains

Amethyst Sinking Feeling
By Liliana Ess on 13 minutes ago
Amethyst
Fissures caused by Concordia have created a canyon landscape full of forests. Pulleys are located at outposts, allowing controlled access to and from the lush green treescapes. Amethyst is the only court that appears truly magical, full of beasts, monsters, and enchanted areas. There is so much ether in the environment here that some Amethystians are Gilded and have too much ether in their blood, causing them to have peculiar physical mutations. Rimouth, capitalThe Forest of ForgettingPercy’s Treehouse
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Amethyst

There is so much ether in the environment here that some Amethystians are Gilded and have too much ether in their blood, causing them to have peculiar physical mutations. Diamond My Favorite Ghost
By Alasdair Sinclair on 28 minutes ago
Diamond
Frozen over upon the capture of Nefarox two centuries ago, Diamond is a winter wonderland: beautiful in the cities and barren in rural areas. The winterscape is quite beautiful and less biting in the inhabited areas. Large ice castles that are oddly not cold to the touch serve as workshops for engineers and designers of new-age technology. This is the center hold for Etherseed, a newer religion that combats Adornism. Cuross, capitalBlackcomb SanctumWhitehaven
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet

This is the center hold for Etherseed, a newer religion that combats Adornism. Cuross, capitalBlackcomb SanctumWhitehaven

Jade Reunion
By Cristobal Aschento on Today at 09:27 pm
Jade
Only natives can navigate through the thick mist that blankets the Court of Jade. The strict militaristic regime keeps the populace in line, but some rebel against the system, hiding in secret places where they plot rebellions or escape into the fog. Visitors must be careful when they speak or act because any infraction could result in imprisonment or even death. Gensu, capitalBitterholdNew Gensu
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet

The strict militaristic regime keeps the populace in line, but some rebel against the system, hiding in secret places where they plot rebellions or escape into the fog. Visitors must be careful when they speak or act because any infraction could result in imprisonment or even death. Gensu, capitalBitterholdNew Gensu

Onyx Tolerance
By Avis Reyes on Today at 03:10 pm
Onyx
At first sight, Onyx is a post-apocalyptic wasteland. But key passages scattered throughout the land allow entrance down into Onyx, an entirely underground court. Deep and vast caverns are their home, with several cities nestled among the stalactites. The stealthy people of Onyx don’t mind the dark, though the underground world is lit by glowing etherite and torches. Ebonmire, capitalStarlit GrottoOblivium’s Ripple
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Onyx

The stealthy people of Onyx don’t mind the dark, though the underground world is lit by glowing etherite and torches. Ebonmire, capitalStarlit GrottoOblivium’s Ripple

Pearl [past] Every Battle Ends In...
By Amaia Mitrea on Today at 09:53 pm
Pearl
Originally an island, Pearl has maintained its beautiful, white-sand beaches and towering rainforests all these centuries. Small jungle towns are within the trees, but much of the activity occurs on the sand, where witches (matriarchal-led men and women) live in seaside caves and beach bungalows. Plenty of hunting and excursions arise deep within the jungle area, where animal life varies. Perinoit, capitalLethe’s StrandBlack Lagoon
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Pearl

Plenty of hunting and excursions arise deep within the jungle area, where animal life varies. Perinoit, capitalLethe’s StrandBlack Lagoon

Ruby Anacoluthon
By Cressida De Cardenas on Today at 09:34 pm
Ruby
Bards sing cautionary tales of the Harrowed that haunt the peaks of Ruby. Various rare plants grow among these mountains, including wild roses whose petals only bloom under the moonlight. The winds constantly howl through the craggy passes and jagged ridges, whistling through the ruins of old fortresses. It's said that if you listen closely enough, you will hear the whispers of dead warlords. Avinica, capitalScarlet CitadelValea Regilor
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Ruby
Bards sing cautionary tales of the Harrowed that haunt the peaks of Ruby. Various rare plants grow among these mountains, including wild roses whose petals only bloom under the moonlight. The winds constantly howl through the craggy passes and jagged ridges, whistling through the ruins of old fortresses. It's said that if you listen closely enough, you will hear the whispers of dead warlords. Avinica, capitalScarlet CitadelValea Regilor

  • Tirin
  • Spectral Woods
It's Oh So Quiet
By Valentine 13 minutes ago
29 threads 205 posts
Sapphire
Corlucet [past] Let's Get Help
By Cyrus Solace on 4 minutes ago
Corlucet
The autonomous, self-governing city-state of Corlucet is located in the heart of the Seven Jeweled Courts. Apart from the academy in which students practice magic, there are other guilds and merchant quarters nearby. Each quarter is a dynamic hub where merchants, crafters, and magicians alike bring diverse customs and cultures to life. Older students, often nobles from one of the seven courts, live off-campus among the common folk while they study. Corlucet Academy for MagicCorlucet Bazaar & TradingDead Plains
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet
Corlucet
The autonomous, self-governing city-state of Corlucet is located in the heart of the Seven Jeweled Courts. Apart from the academy in which students practice magic, there are other guilds and merchant quarters nearby. Each quarter is a dynamic hub where merchants, crafters, and magicians alike bring diverse customs and cultures to life. Older students, often nobles from one of the seven courts, live off-campus among the common folk while they study. Corlucet Academy for MagicCorlucet Bazaar & TradingDead Plains

Corlucet
The autonomous, self-governing city-state of Corlucet is located in the heart of the Seven Jeweled Courts. Apart from the academy in which students practice magic, there are other guilds and merchant quarters nearby. Each quarter is a dynamic hub where merchants, crafters, and magicians alike bring diverse customs and cultures to life. Older students, often nobles from one of the seven courts, live off-campus among the common folk while they study.
  • Corlucet Academy for Magic
  • Corlucet Bazaar & Trading
  • Dead Plains

Amethyst Sinking Feeling
By Liliana Ess on 13 minutes ago
Amethyst
Fissures caused by Concordia have created a canyon landscape full of forests. Pulleys are located at outposts, allowing controlled access to and from the lush green treescapes. Amethyst is the only court that appears truly magical, full of beasts, monsters, and enchanted areas. There is so much ether in the environment here that some Amethystians are Gilded and have too much ether in their blood, causing them to have peculiar physical mutations. Rimouth, capitalThe Forest of ForgettingPercy’s Treehouse
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet

Amethyst is the only court that appears truly magical, full of beasts, monsters, and enchanted areas. There is so much ether in the environment here that some Amethystians are Gilded and have too much ether in their blood, causing them to have peculiar physical mutations. Fissures caused by Concordia have created a canyon landscape full of forests. Pulleys are located at outposts, allowing controlled access to and from the lush green treescapes. Diamond My Favorite Ghost
By Alasdair Sinclair on 28 minutes ago
Diamond
Frozen over upon the capture of Nefarox two centuries ago, Diamond is a winter wonderland: beautiful in the cities and barren in rural areas. The winterscape is quite beautiful and less biting in the inhabited areas. Large ice castles that are oddly not cold to the touch serve as workshops for engineers and designers of new-age technology. This is the center hold for Etherseed, a newer religion that combats Adornism. Cuross, capitalBlackcomb SanctumWhitehaven
26 amethyst 16 diamond 17 jade 17 onyx 13 pearl 34 ruby 15 sapphire 25 corlucet

This is the center hold for Etherseed, a newer religion that combats Adornism. Cuross, capitalBlackcomb SanctumWhitehaven
